mapper.select: WITH USER_TOTAL AS (SELECT U.USER_SEQ, U.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, UC.CASH_BALANCE, COALESCE(M.buySum, 0) AS buySum, COALESCE(M.sellSum, 0) AS sellSum, (COALESCE(M.sellSum, 0) - COALESCE(M.buySum, 0)) AS totalRevenue, CASE WHEN COALESCE(M.buySum, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( (COALESCE(M.sellSum, 0) - COALESCE(M.buySum, 0)) / COALESCE(M.buySum, 0) * 100, 2 ) END AS totalRevenueRate FROM USERS U LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_ACCOUNT UC ON U.USER_SEQ = UC.USER_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT USER_SEQ, SUM(CASE WHEN TRADE_TYPE = 'Y' THEN TRADE_PRICE ELSE 0 END) AS buySum, SUM(CASE WHEN TRADE_TYPE = 'N' THEN TRADE_PRICE ELSE 0 END) AS sellSum FROM MOCK_TRADE GROUP BY USER_SEQ) M ON U.USER_SEQ = M.USER_SEQ), RANKED AS (SELECT UT.*, (UT.CASH_BALANCE + UT.totalRevenue) AS totalAsset, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (UT.CASH_BALANCE + UT.totalRevenue) DESC) AS userAssetRank, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY UT.totalRevenueRate DESC ,UT.totalRevenue DESC) AS userRevenueRank FROM USER_TOTAL UT) SELECT * FROM RANKED WHERE USER_SEQ = #{userSeq};

SELECT * , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DD.totalAsset DESC) AS userAssetRank FROM (SELECT * , (CC.cash_balance + CC.totalRevenue) AS totalAsset FROM (SELECT UC.USER_SEQ , U.USER_ID , U.USER_NAME , UC.CASH_BALANCE , BB.totalRevenueRate AS totalRevenueRate , BB.totalAsset AS totalRevenue FROM USER_ACCOUNT UC LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT AA.USER_SEQ , AA.buySum AS totalBuy , AA.sellSum AS totalSell , CASE WHEN buySum = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(((sellSum - buySum) / buySum) * 100, 2) END AS totalRevenueRate , (sellSum - buySum) AS totalAsset FROM (SELECT USER_SEQ, SUM(CASE WHEN TRADE_TYPE = 'Y' THEN TRADE_PRICE ELSE 0 END) AS buySum, SUM(CASE WHEN TRADE_TYPE = 'N' THEN TRADE_PRICE ELSE 0 END) AS sellSum FROM MOCK_TRADE GROUP BY USER_SEQ) AA) BB ON UC.USER_SEQ = BB.USER_SEQ
LEFT OUTER JOIN USERS U ON UC.USER_SEQ = U.USER_SEQ )CC ) DD

SELECT * FROM (SELECT * , (CC.cash_balance + CC.totalRevenue) AS totalAsset ,ROW_NUMBER() over (ORDER BY CC.totalRevenueRate DESC, CC.totalRevenue DESC) AS userRevenueRank FROM (SELECT UC.USER_SEQ , U.USER_ID , U.USER_NAME , UC.CASH_BALANCE , BB.totalRevenueRate AS totalRevenueRate , BB.totalAsset AS totalRevenue FROM USER_ACCOUNT UC LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT AA.USER_SEQ , AA.buySum AS totalBuy , AA.sellSum AS totalSell , CASE WHEN buySum = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(((sellSum - buySum) / buySum) * 100, 2) END AS totalRevenueRate , (sellSum - buySum) AS totalAsset FROM (SELECT USER_SEQ, SUM(CASE WHEN TRADE_TYPE = 'Y' THEN TRADE_PRICE ELSE 0 END) AS buySum, SUM(CASE WHEN TRADE_TYPE = 'N' THEN TRADE_PRICE ELSE 0 END) AS sellSum FROM MOCK_TRADE GROUP BY USER_SEQ) AA) BB ON UC.USER_SEQ = BB.USER_SEQ
LEFT OUTER JOIN USERS U ON UC.USER_SEQ = U.USER_SEQ )CC ) DD
SELECT COUNT(USER_SEQ) AS totUserCnt FROM USERS;
